svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="Q4umbZ7rHYmmaIgD93x-" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-489" dy="-150" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="LLM Training Pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="100" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0047AB;" value="Phase 1: Pre-Training" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="220" x="30" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1_container" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="220" x="30" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1_data" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;" value="Massive Text Corpus
(Trillions of tokens)
Web, Books, Code, etc." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="55" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1_tokenize" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Tokenization
(BPE / SentencePiece)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="170" x="55" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1_model" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Transformer Model
(Random Init)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="170" x="55" y="255" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1_objective" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Objective: Next Token Prediction
(Causal LM / MLM)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="170" x="55" y="325" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1_out" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Foundation Model
(Base LLM)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="55" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p1_1" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1_data" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p1_tokenize"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p1_2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1_tokenize" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p1_model"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p1_3" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1_model" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p1_objective"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p1_4" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1_objective" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p1_out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#145A32;" value="Phase 2: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="240" x="290" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2_container" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="220" x="290" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2_base" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Foundation Model
(from Phase 1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="170" x="315" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2_data" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Instruction Dataset
(Prompt-Response pairs)
InstructGPT, Alpaca, etc." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="170" x="315" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2_train" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Fine-tune on Demonstrations
(Cross-entropy loss)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="170" x="315" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2_out" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Instruction-Tuned Model
(SFT Model)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="315" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p2_1" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2_base" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p2_data"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p2_2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2_data" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p2_train"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p2_3" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2_train" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p2_out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7B0000;" value="Phase 3: RLHF / DPO Alignment" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="260" x="555" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3_container" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="240" x="555" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3_sft" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="SFT Model
(from Phase 2)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="580" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3_human" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Human Preference Data
(Ranked comparisons)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="580" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3_reward" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Reward Model Training
(Learns human preferences)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="580" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3_ppo" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="PPO / DPO Optimization
(Policy gradient update)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="580" y="325" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3_out" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;" value="Aligned LLM
(Helpful, Harmless, Honest)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="170" x="580" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p3_1" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3_sft" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p3_human"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p3_2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3_human" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p3_reward"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p3_3" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3_reward" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p3_ppo"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p3_4" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3_ppo" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p3_out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn1" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1_out" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#0047AB;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p2_base" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2_out" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#145A32;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p3_sft" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="feedback_loop" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f8cecc;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=1;fontStyle=2;" value="Iterative Feedback Loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="240" x="555" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="feedback_arrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3_out" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#b85450;dashed=1;" target="p3_human" value="Iterate"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="810" y="427" /> <mxPoint x="810" y="200" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
